goal: Document planned extensions beyond the MVP.
extensions: Replace heuristic blob motion with optical-flow priors learned from CelebV-HQ or eCelebV-style face videos.
Replace polygon-based parsing with a pretrained face parsing model.
Add stochastic multi-sample motion generation from one image.
Add V2E-compatible event camera noise and threshold models.
Evaluate generated events on real event-based face landmark, blink detection, or expression recognition tasks.
Extend from face-specific semantic priors to other structured object categories.
